hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq "git push (origin )?(main|master)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Direct push to main/master is prohibited. Create a feature branch and open a PR instead." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

PreToolUse.description: Block git push to main/master — enforce PR-only workflow

hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eiq "Co-Authored-By.*(Claude|GPT|Copilot|anthropic|openai|AI|LLM|Cursor|noreply@anthropic)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Commit contains LLM co-author attribution. Remove the Co-Authored-By line and retry." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

PreToolUse.description: Block commits with LLM Co-Authored-By lines

hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file_path" | grep -q "\.env"; then content=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"content\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$content" | grep -Eiq "(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36}|xox[baprs]-|-----BEGIN .* PRIVATE KEY)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Attempting to write real secrets to .env file. Use .env.example with placeholder values instead." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0'

PreToolUse.description: Block writing .env files with real secrets

hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file_path" | grep -Eq "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$"; then if [ -f "$file_path" ]; then matches=$(grep -n "console\.log" "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$matches" ]; then echo "WARNING: console.log found in $file_path" >&2; echo "$matches" | head -5 >&2; fi; fi; fi; exit 0'

PostToolUse.description: Warn about console.log statements after code edits

hooks.command: bash -c 'cd /home/carlomigueldy/personal/gf-vid-chat 2>/dev/null || exit 0; if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$staged" ]; then while IFS= read -r file; do if [ -f "$file" ] && grep -Eq "(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{32,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36}|-----BEGIN .* PRIVATE KEY)" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "CRITICAL: Potential secret found in staged file: $file" >&2; fi; done <<< "$staged"; fi; fi; exit 0'

Stop.description: Verify no secrets in staged files before session ends

hooks.command: bash -c 'cd /home/carlomigueldy/personal/gf-vid-chat 2>/dev/null || exit 0; if [ -f CLAUDE.md ] && [ -f AGENTS.md ]; then if ! diff -q CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "WARNING: CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md are out of sync! Run: cp CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md" >&2; fi; elif [ -f CLAUDE.md ] && [ ! -f AGENTS.md ]; then echo "WARNING: AGENTS.md is missing! Copy from CLAUDE.md." >&2; fi; exit 0'

Stop.description: Verify CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md are in sync
